name: Titanium Add-on
description: A complete Titanium progression tier for Minecraft Bedrock — mine it, smelt it, forge it, and upgrade it into endgame Titanium+ gear via the Smithing Table.

name: BladeX PvP Practice Map
description: The map allows you to practice different PvP gamemodes against bots. You can customize kits and change different settings for both the bots and the map.

name: Ancxliy Pack V7
description: This pack also introduces new variants for many blocks such as grass, leaves, stone, planks, flowers, and more, giving every area its own unique character. Exploring the world becomes more satisfying and visually exciting.

name: Beautifully Better Grass
description: Beautifully Better Grass adds subtle flowers and texture variants to terrain blocks, making your Minecraft Bedrock world feel more alive and natural, without changing the vanilla feel.

name: Hotbar Slot Button
description: This resource pack adds new buttons that act like hotbars. Each button changes the held item depending on the button,

name: Minecraft Panorama
description: 🟩 Turned a Minecraft-inspired comic-style loading screen concept into a custom Bedrock Global Resource Pack panorama featuring Zombie, Skeleton, Creeper, Enderman, Steve, Alex, and a custom Panorama logo. 🔥👑⚡

name: Akatsuki cloud
description: The dawn rises on a new generation of outcasts. Akatsuki Cloud brings the most iconic rogue aesthetic to your favorite archetypes, reimagining diverse characters draped in the infamous black cloak and crimson clouds.

name: Bedrock UI+
description: A brand new ui Overhauled from hud+, this ui improves a lots of ui screens, also have so many features that Will helps you in gameplay, such as survival, PVP, etc.

name: Emeralds To Rubies
description: Emeralds to Rubies is a vanilla-styled resource pack that replaces emerald-themed textures with beautiful ruby versions while keeping the classic Minecraft feel intact.

name: FPS Booster | No Lag & Fps Boost
description: This is one of the best performance-boosting packs for Minecraft Pocket Edition, optimized to give you the maximum possible FPS and seamless performance. Whether you're on version 1.16 or 1.21 , this pack works like OptiFine for MCPE—but better. No other pack can match its speed and efficiency. It Is Made For Maximum Fps boost.

name: Titanium Add-on Beta v6.0.2: Phase Two
description: A complete Titanium progression tier for Minecraft Bedrock — mine it, smelt it, forge it, and upgrade it into endgame Titanium+ gear via the Smithing Table.

name: Toggle Night Vision
description: Want to see caves but too lazy to get torches? This pack makes easier for you to see in dark places without them!

name: Java Subtitles
description: This texture pack repositions the current Closed Caption feature recently added on Minecraft Preview 26.0.5 and moves it at the bottom left corner, similar to Minecraft Java.

name: Pause Screen Fixer
description: Swaps the marketplace button with the settings button.

name: Cape Physics Resource Pack
description: This resource pack ONLY modifies the cape animation and does not add capes. Meaning you have to equip the Pan Cape, Mojang Cape, Cherry Blossom cape or any capes that are already in the game.

name: Pure Optimizer V2
description: Boost Optimizer V2 is a high-performance utility pack designed to maximize your frame rates while delivering a sleek, competitive edge. Whether you’re running on a low-end rig or just want the smoothest gameplay possible for high-stakes PvP, this pack strips away the lag and optimizes your visuals for pure efficiency.

name: Amixi Practice
description: This is Amixi Practice, a practice map which contains most of the stuff you need to train and improve.

name: Simple Status Bar
description: Easily track player health and armor with a sleek, minimalist overhead UI. Designed to be clean and unobtrusive, this pack gives you a competitive edge without cluttering your screen.

name: That's Not My Villager
description: Your job as a doorman is to allow or deny access to applicants seeking entry to your building. You will use tenants' documents and information to determine whether the applicant is truly a villager or not.

name: Enhanced 16x - FPS Booster And Better Visuals
description: Enhanced 16x is a Optimised FPS booster texture pack with enhancing textures of essential items.It removes background features to optimize game and visuals.

name: Animated Menu: Lonely Night Train
description: A quiet night. An empty train. A cinematic anime-style background that turns your Minecraft main menu into something you actually want to stare at. Lonely Night Train brings a moody, atmospheric lofi aesthetic to every time you launch the game.

name: y Better Low Fire's
description:
Make Fire Better and Lower
Also makes it clearer

name: Medieval Structures
description: Medieval Structures is a Minecraft Bedrock add-on that adds dozens of new medieval structures to your world, powered by our own Feudal Furniture add-on!

name: BlueMods Optimization
description: Want more FPS and a cleaner look? This pack removes annoying particles, gives you a sleek dark interface, and cleans up world generation. Great for low-end PCs and mobile or if you just hate visual clutter. Game feels way smoother.

name: Dark UI Transparent
description: Designed for players who prefer a dark, minimal, and aggressive look, the Red UI Pack gives Minecraft Bedrock a sleek dark transparent interface that feels modern and immersive. Every UI element is refined to reduce visual clutter while keeping everything sharp and readable—perfect for both Survival and PvP gameplay.

name: phosphor - Optimizer
description: This is one of the best optimization pack of Minecraft Bedrock & Pocket. This pack is focused on increasing FPS and various features. This pack has 35 Features and it's very lightweight too! So, If you want to double your FPS, This would be best for you!

name: Cute Turtle Helmet
description: Turn your turtle shell into a cute turtle with jiggle physics

name: Utility HUD
description:
Utility HUD (PC & Mobile)
It's an inventory overlay pack that adds some QoL features (PvP focused) in HUD. This type of packs were previously only possible on touch devices. But now it's possible thanks to T1M0THY's Discovery

name: RG Shader
description: RG Shader Is A Texture Pack Based Shader Which Animated All grass ,Leafs To Match With Real Life .It also Adds Fogs which create A light Scatter effect. Overall it is best for those who can't use vibrant visuals and don't use patch . We Recommend You To Use This .Give It A Try.

name: Ultimate Vein Miner
description: Enhance your resource gathering in Minecraft with this all-in-one addon that combines Tree Capitator and Vein Miner. Instantly chop entire trees with one swing and mine full ore veins effortlessly, saving time and effort. It also has leaf capitator with loot system.

name: Warriors Client
description: Warriors' Client is a powerful and feature-packed modification for Minecraft PE, carefully designed to enhance your gameplay, streamline item management, and boost performance — all while giving you a competitive edge on the battlefield.

name: Pure Optimizer
description: Say goodbye to lag and hello to smooth gameplay! This ultimate optimization pack is crafted to deliver maximum performance in Minecraft Pocket Edition (MCPE) and Bedrock Edition (BE).

name: Less Instrutuve chat
description: doesn't cover your screen and frees it up alot of space. Idk what category would it be. Could be helpful in pvp. As a utility. I think It's all category. Survival, utility,pvp

name: Alya Ui
description: Alya Ui Is a animated ui for Minecraft pe/ be it adda alya anime wallpaper to start screen and ads pink theme to game .Best for anime lovers . Why use boring minecraft ui when you got a new flavour.

name: Origin Animation
description: This Animation Packs Enhances Minecraft with New animations. There are Now Only 30 animations which is few and I am able To get this done by help of Ender1000 and Thekidsky 'a animation packs . This is being made to compete with actions and Stuff  . I want your suggestion for improving this . please Comment

name: Re-imagined Intro
description: Re-imagined Intro is a resource pack that adds a smooth and animated intro experience to Minecraft Bedrock Edition, giving the game a fresh and modern appearance before reaching the main menu.
